title: Pyromania
content:
She had a fireplace - 
        the sexual kiln
        of her pyromaniac
        desire,
        a brick embedded in heat,
        white hot coal to ember,
        her lust flaring red,
        soot to powder
        dark as charcoal
        smear, a walk
        across shimmering mirror.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Paul Cameron Brown delivers a powerful performance in "Pyromania"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
